description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven local repository at .m2/, defines the MAVEN_OPTS variable as -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2, and sets a single build stage. Add a job called melakukan-build-dan-package in the build stage that uses the maven:3-eclipse-temurin-21-alpine Docker image, runs the command mvn clean package -DskipTests -Dspring.profiles.active=heroku, and publishes any target/*.jar files as artifacts. The pipeline has no additional rules or deployment targets.
